summary: Preinstall beacon exfiltrates host identity to Burp Collaborator subdomain
details: On `npm install`, the preinstall lifecycle script (preinstall.js:5-9) issues an HTTPS GET to `h5nvwrz2815ubw84cpkwhezm5db9z1nq.b.mburpcollab.com` with the installer's `npm_package_name` and `os.hostname()` as query parameters. This fires without consent on every install and transmits machine-identifying information to a third-party HTTP/DNS collaborator host controlled by whoever generated the subdomain. The package's extreme version number (19999.0.1) and minimal scope-shadowing name (`@pelmnaads/naads-common-logger`) are consistent with a dependency-confusion probe targeting an internal package of the same name.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
